title: The USB Reversal
sourceText: I tried to plug in a USB cable, turned it twice, and it only fitted in the original position.

segments.speaker: commentator
segments.text: Merrin approaches the port with the cable in his right hand. There appears to be no pressure at all.

segments.speaker: commentator
segments.text: First attempt, and the port shuts the route immediately. He turns the cable over and resets.

segments.speaker: commentator
segments.text: It still will not go. He is running out of ideas now, and he turns it back to the exact position he started from.

segments.speaker: commentator
segments.text: IT IS IN! THE ORIGINAL POSITION HAS WON IT AT THE THIRD ATTEMPT!

segments.speaker: analyst
segments.text: You have to question both rotations. He had the correct alignment from the beginning, but he did not trust the system.
